zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Gifford於1574年出生在英國哈普爾金斯 索波內時，她的父親Henry Gifford24歲，母親Susanna Brounker26歲。她於1594年1月1日與Sir John Portman 1st Baronet在英國英格蘭薩默塞特格阿瑟爾斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1638年2月11日在英國薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Gifford于1574年出生在英国哈普爾金斯 索波內时，她的父亲Henry Gifford24岁，母亲Susanna Brounker26岁。她于1594年1月1日与Sir John Portman 1st Baronet在英国英格兰薩默塞特格阿瑟爾斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1638年2月11日在英国薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Gifford was born in 1574, in Kings Somborne, Hampshire, England, her father, Henry Gifford, was 24 and her mother, Susanna Brounker, was 26. She married Sir John Portman 1st Baronet on 1 January 1594, in Goathurst, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 11 February 1638, in Orchard Portman, Somerset, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Orchard Portman, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Gifford est née en 1574, à Kings Somborne, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Gifford, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Susanna Brounker, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Portman 1st Baronet le 1 janvier 1594, à Goathurst, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 février 1638, à Orchard Portman, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Orchard Portman, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Gifford è nata il nel 1574 nel Kings Somborne, Hampshire, England, sua padre, Henry Gifford, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Susanna Brounker, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Portman 1st Baronet il 1 gennaio 1594, nel Goathurst, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 febbraio 1638, nel Orchard Portman, Somerset, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Orchard Portman, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Giffordが1574年にイギリスハンプシュアイアキングズ ソンボルンで生まれた時，父Henry Giffordは24歳，母Susanna Brounkerは26歳であった。1594年1月1日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトゴアスウルストでSir John Portman 1st Baronetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1638年2月11日にイギリスソメルセトオルチャード ポルトマンで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトオルチャード ポルトマンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Gifford(이)가 1574년 영국 함프실르 킨그스 서본에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Gifford(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susanna Brounker(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1594년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 고스르스트에서 Sir John Portman 1st Baronet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1638년 2월 11일 영국 서머세트 오처드 포트먼에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 오처드 포트먼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Gifford nasceu em 1574, em Kings Somborne, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Gifford, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Brounker, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Portman 1st Baronet em 1 de janeiro de 1594, em Goathurst, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1638, em Orchard Portman, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Orchard Portman, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Gifford родилась в 1574 г. в местности кингс сомборн, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Gifford было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Susanna Brounker, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Portman 1st Baronet 1 января 1594 г. в местности гоатурст, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 11 февраля 1638 г. в местности орчард портман, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности орчард портман, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
